Title: MemorySmith.Agent — Current Phase Status
Content:
Phases 0-3 are complete and CI is green. Phase 4 (adaptive execution, vision) is in progress.

Phase 0 (Skeleton): all interfaces, wiki pages, CI baseline.
Phase 1 (Core MVP): MinecraftAdapter.ConnectAsync with subprocess launch and port-wait, MoveToTool, StatusTool, AgentBackgroundService hosted loop.
Phase 2 (Memory): RestMemoryGateway (IHttpClientFactory), SearchMemoryTool, GetPageTool, CreatePageTool, MockMemoryGateway. SearchResult.Kind disambiguates page slugs from memory UUIDs.
Phase 3 (Planner): HtnPlanner (await/try-catch ReplanAsync), HtnTaskLibrary (8 task methods), GatherWoodGoal, SurviveNightGoal, IGoalFactory, GoalFactory, POST /api/agent/plan, GET /api/goals.
Phase 4 (started): ActionData.Context bag for inter-tool state carry; SearchMemoryTool writes bestPageId to ToolResult.Data; AgentBackgroundService carries plan context between actions. WebSocketBridge fully implemented with background receive loop. MineflayerAdapter/index.js fully implemented with pathfinder.

CI baseline: 48+ tests passing. Last green commit: 41f75a33. Repo: https://github.com/TheMasonX/MemorySmith.Agent
